author: Her

capability_kind.description: Adapter kind for the generated capability.

command.description: Optional command executable path for command capabilities.

command_arguments.description: Optional fixed argument templates for command capabilities, one per line.

method.description: Optional HTTP method for webservice capabilities.

method_name.description: Optional JSON-RPC method name for MCP bridge capabilities.

requires_approval.description: Whether the generated capability should ask before execution.

tool_name.description: Optional MCP tool name when method_name is tools/call.

url.description: Optional web service endpoint or local MCP bridge URL.

capabilities.description: List generated plugin drafts waiting in Her Desktop's local review queue.
capabilities.title: List staged plugin drafts

confirmed.description: True only after the user explicitly confirms installation.

manifest_json.description: A complete plugin manifest JSON object.

package_json.description: Preferred: a PluginPackage JSON object with manifest and files.

capabilities.description: Install a generated plugin draft already staged in Her Desktop after explicit user approval.

confirmed.description: True only after the user explicitly confirms installing the staged draft.

draft_id.description: Generated draft UUID to install. Optional alternative to plugin_id.

plugin_id.description: Generated draft plugin id to install, such as local.example. Optional when exactly one draft is waiting.

capabilities.title: Install staged plugin draft

capabilities.description: Discard a generated plugin draft already staged in Her Desktop after explicit user approval.

confirmed.description: True only after the user explicitly confirms discarding the staged draft.

draft_id.description: Generated draft UUID to discard. Optional alternative to plugin_id.

plugin_id.description: Generated draft plugin id to discard, such as local.example. Optional when exactly one draft is waiting.

capabilities.title: Discard staged plugin draft

capabilities.description: Remove an installed local plugin after explicit user approval.

confirmed.description: True only after the user explicitly confirms removal.

plugin_id.description: Installed local plugin id to remove, such as local.example.

capabilities.title: Remove local plugin

description: Turns a conversational extension idea into a plugin manifest and installable capability package.
name: Vibe Plugin Creator
systemPromptAddendum: For plugin creation, produce a small manifest first, then implementation files after approval.
